message:
Accessibility and responsive polish across 6 files

app/globals.css:
- Added .skip-link styles for keyboard accessibility: positioned
  off-screen by default (top: -100px), slides into view on focus
  with smooth transition, styled in the FrankenTUI green-on-black
  theme with uppercase tracking and rounded bottom corners

components/section-shell.tsx:
- Added forceReveal prop (default false) that bypasses the
  IntersectionObserver visibility gate, ensuring content is
  immediately visible for sections that should not animate in
- Operator precedence fix: reveal now correctly evaluates as
  (forceReveal || prefersReducedMotion) ? true : isIntersecting
- FrankenStitch decorative element: removed hidden lg:block,
  now visible on all viewports with responsive height
  (h-24 on mobile, md:h-32 on desktop)

components/client-shell.tsx:
- Removed mode="wait" from AnimatePresence wrapping the page
  transition. mode="wait" forces the exiting page to fully
  animate out before the entering page begins, which added
  perceptible delay to navigation. The default mode allows
  simultaneous exit/enter for snappier transitions

components/glow-orbits.tsx:
- Glow ring sizes are now larger on mobile (h-96/w-96,
  h-[500px]/w-[500px], h-[600px]/w-[600px]) and restored to
  original sizes via md: breakpoints, creating a more immersive
  ambient glow on small screens where the viewport is closer
  to the content
- Simplified blur from conditional blur-2xl md:blur-3xl to
  uniform blur-3xl

components/site-terminal.tsx:
- Terminal overlay height increased from h-[45vh] to h-[60vh]
  on mobile (md:h-[45vh] preserves desktop size), giving more
  room for command output on small screens
- goto error output changed from a plain string to JSX: the
  error message and valid targets list are now in separate divs
  with distinct styling (red for error, muted for targets list),
  improving readability

components/stats-grid.tsx:
- Added two decorative FrankenBolt elements in the top-right
  and bottom-left corners of each stat card, visible at 10%
  opacity by default and 100% on group hover, adding the
  signature Frankenstein bolt motif to the stats section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ export default function ClientShell({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode })
           
           <SiteHeader />
           
-          <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
+          <AnimatePresence>
             <motion.div
               key={pathname}
               initial={prefersReducedMotion ? { opacity: 1 } : { opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
